channel.title: PlantUML on upyesp
channel.description: Recent content in PlantUML on upyesp

item.title: Add UML Diagrams To Markdown With PlantUML
item.description: PlantUML provides an extensive markup language to describe diagrams. The resulting diagrams can be exported to many formats, including graphics files such as .png, .svg and formats such as .pdf and .html.
